core_mechanism: replica-symmetry-breaking / mean-field analysis of a rugged high-dimensional random energy landscape, characterizing its exponentially many metastable states (the 'complexity') and the resulting split between a dynamical arrest transition and a distinct static thermodynamic transition
brief_reason: The abstract analyzes one disordered model through thermodynamics (overlap distribution, replica symmetry breaking, static transition), dynamics (generating functional, mode-coupling, dynamical transition), and complexity (metastable states, threshold energy, saddles), all of which are the machinery for the statistics of a rough multi-valley energy landscape.
